name: Anandalahari
overview: Two families from East and West Godavari collide in a hilarious journey filled with cultural clashes, romance, and domestic mayhem as traditions and modern life intertwine along the banks of India's great river.

trailers.title: Anandalahari Web Series Trailer | Premieres 17th Oct On Aha | Abhishek | Bramarambika |Sai Vanapalli
